questions.question: Describe the main difference between Nearest-Neighbor Learning and Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor Algorithm. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Elaborate on the key distinction between these two concepts.

questions.question: What is the primary advantage of using Nearest Centroid Classifier over other similarity-based learning methods? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits of using Nearest Centroid Classifier in a real-world scenario.

questions.question: How Locally Weighted is Locally Weighted classifiers different from Weighted K-Nearest-Neighbor Algorithm? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Compare and contrast the two concepts, highlighting their key differences.
